name: QA 540
description:
PCP QA Test No. 540

valgrind version of qa/504 ...

Use libpcp_fault to exercise __pmProcessExec() and friends from libpcp.



Copyright (c) 2017 Ken McDonell.  All Rights Reserved.
descriptionHtml:
PCP QA Test No. 540

valgrind version of qa/504 ...

Use libpcp_fault to exercise __pmProcessExec() and friends from libpcp.

Copyright (c) 2017 Ken McDonell. All Rights Reserved.
